title: Guduling 8pcs Bamboo Knitting Needles Set, Chunky Knitting Needles, Single-Pointed Bamboo Wood, Suitable for Beginners and Professional Knitters (4/6/8/10 mm x 25cm)
features: 【Package List】 You will receive 8pcs bamboo knitting needles, 4 different models, each one is hand-engraved with a model number for easy distinction. This set of short knitting needles is suitable for different types of cotton threads and knitting patterns

【High-quality Materials】 These bamboo knitting needles are made of natural bamboo wood, which feels warm, environmentally friendly and durable. Compared with metal knitting needles, they feel more comfortable and lightweight. Natural bamboo provides a comfortable grip and a smooth knitting experience

【Four Sizes】 Children's knitting needles include 4mm, 6mm, 8mm, 10mm, and each is 25 cm long. Different sizes of knitting needles set are marked with models for easy distinction, which is very suitable for little craftsmen who are learning the basics of knitting and DIY projects

【Thoughtful Design】The knitting needles have a 4mm single-pointed design and a rounded tip on the other end, which prevents the cotton thread from slipping off. They are very suitable for various knitting projects such as sweaters and scarves, sweaters, bandage socks, gloves, sweaters, cardigans, etc

【Ideal Gift】This knitting needle set is lightweight and easy to operate, with a unique design and a full range of size options, helping beginners improve their skills while enjoying the fun of hand knitting. It is a great gift for knitters
description: ----------------- WELCOME TO OUR SHOP ----------------- Bamboo Knitting Needles Function/Use: Fabric Product Color: Wood Color Product Material: Bamboo Product Gross Weight: 68g Product Packaging Size: 33 X 23 X 1.8 CM Product Size: 10 mm knitting needles: 25.5 X 1.8 X 1 CM/10 X 0.7 X 0.4 IN 8 mm Bamboo Knitting Needle: 25.5 X 1.7 X 0.8 CM/10 X 0.7 X 0.3 IN 6 mm chunky knitting needles: 25.5 X 1.3 X 0.6 CM/10 X 0.5 X 0.24 IN 4 mm needle for knitting: 25.5 X 9.4 X 0.4 CM/10 X 3.7 X 0.16 IN Packing List: 8pcs Short Knitting Needles
